failure_scenarios.reasoning: The current portfolio construction implicitly assumes that GLD (16%) and DBC (19.8%) provide some hedge against the conditions that would stress HYG. However, forward_guidance (BULLISH, novelty 9) identifies a structural dollar strengthening scenario driven by energy dominance and stablecoin adoption — a strong dollar would normally be expected to hurt commodities (DBC) and gold (GLD), meaning all three positions could move adversely simultaneously.
